case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF VS DANIELS LENORA

docket_entries.description: WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT DANIELS LENORA
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT DANIELS LENORA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DANIELS LENORA $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,030.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-18-1992, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-18-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DANIELS LENORA
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $796.48 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT DANIELS LENORA

WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $5,733.87 AS TO DEFENDANT DANIELS LENORA
